overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant futuristic city with neon signage, descending to an industrial waterfront area with steam pipes, and crossing streets with futuristic traffic. The scene features warm golden hour lighting, towering skyscrapers, and a mix of commercial promenades and industrial maintenance walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade following a pedestrian in orange pants and blue cap

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange pants and blue cap walking ahead of the player

entered.detail: tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with spires and neon accents in the background
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
tropical palm tree lining the street
elevated walkway with orange trim and blue neon lights spanning the street
metal railing along the water edge with red painted trim

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated waterfront promenade in a futuristic cyberpunk city, following a pedestrian in orange pants. Neon billboards and palm trees line the left side while the waterfront railing borders the right, with towering skyscrapers visible in the golden hour sunlight ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance walkway beneath the overpass

events.description: enters covered area beneath the overpass structure with reduced lighting
descends metal stairs to lower industrial waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and descending yellow metal stairs to the industrial waterfront level

entered.detail: yellow metal stairs with grating leading down to lower level
grated metal walkway floor with yellow safety railings

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the covered overpass structure, transitioning from the commercial promenade to an industrial maintenance area. The lighting becomes mixed as the character descends yellow metal stairs toward the waterfront level, with steam vents visible along the grated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pipe maintenance area adjacent to water

events.description: steam billows from large industrial pipes near the water surface

agents.ego_description: exploring the industrial waterfront area, examining large pipes and steam vents near the water

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial pipe with steam leaking from joints
large white storage tank with yellow safety railing
body of water visible below the industrial platform
curved red metal bridge or walkway structure spanning across the view

segments.scene_description: The character explores a narrow industrial maintenance walkway featuring massive white pipes and cylindrical tanks with steam venting near the water. The red arch structure curves overhead while the futuristic skyline rises in the background, backlit by the golden sun.

events.description: ascends yellow stairs from industrial level back to street level
crosses the street as futuristic sports cars drive past

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to street level and crossing the road with other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car driving along the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: metal stairs ascending from the industrial level to street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
large illuminated 24/7 store sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends from the industrial waterfront back to street level, emerging at a crosswalk with a 24/7 store visible. The character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians as futuristic vehicles drive past, transitioning from the enclosed industrial zone to the open urban intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and landscaped trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade passing benches and trees, following a pedestrian in a studded jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in studded leather jacket walking ahead along the promenade

entered.detail: uniquely shaped tree with gnarled trunk and bench underneath
blue benches with neon accents along the waterfront railing
blue metal railing with horizontal bars along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront promenade, passing blue benches and a distinctive twisted tree. Other pedestrians walk in opposing directions while the futuristic skyline remains visible in the distance, with neon storefronts and palm trees lining the route back toward the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant commercial promenade down into a gritty industrial waterfront before returning to the open urban streets. It begins by following a pedestrian along an elevated walkway lined with neon billboards and palm trees, moving toward towering skyscrapers bathed in golden hour sunlight. As the character passes under a covered overpass, the scene shifts from the bright promenade to a dim industrial maintenance area, descending yellow metal stairs toward a network of grated walkways and venting steam pipes. The camera then navigates through a narrow corridor of massive white tanks and red overhead arches before ascending back to street level, emerging at a busy intersection with a 24/7 store and passing futuristic vehicles. Finally, the movement flows back onto the waterfront promenade, passing blue benches and a twisted tree as the environment returns to the neon-lit commercial district.
